composite.activeTabText:
⊕ Relationships
      ⬢ Groups
    
    
      ⊕
      
        Connect
        Understand relationship dynamics through composite charts (two people) and group field analysis (Clusters). See which new channels activate when your energy fields overlap.
      
    
    
      What relationship field analysis reveals
      
        New channels that activate when you're together (electromagnetic bridges)
        Definition changes — e.g., an individual gains emotional authority
        Dominant gates & shared themes in the relationship field
        Potential blind spots and missing energies
      
      Essential for understanding partnership dynamics, business collaborations, and family resonance patterns.
    
    
       Composite Chart
      Analyze relationship dynamics between two people. Start manually, or launch from a client workspace to prefill the people already in motion.
